name: BernieSanders.com
subject: What happens tomorrow depends on you
body:
#
There are two primaries tomorrow, one in Kentucky and another in Oregon. I want to tell you why they matter and ask you to take action that can help tip both of them in our favor.
First, **Kentucky,** a state Hillary Clinton won with 65 percent of the vote in 2008 and no one thought we had a chance to win this time around. But we can win! That's why Hillary Clinton went back on the air with television ads last week. **A win here would shock the political establishment and keep our momentum going.**
Second is **Oregon** , where they vote by mail. People have until tomorrow night to turn in their ballots, and with all the ballots turned in thus far, we think it's a pretty close race. But we also believe the majority of people who have yet to cast their vote are Bernie backers, and we have to make sure those ballots get turned in on time!
**So, here 's what Bernie needs you to do: make a few phone calls reminding likely Bernie supporters to cast their vote before the polls close tomorrow. Both races are close, so every call counts.**
**[YES, I CAN CALL VOTERS FOR BERNIE NOW](https://go.berniesanders.com/call-now-1 "https://go.berniesanders.com/call-now-1")**
**[YES, SIGN ME UP TO MAKE CALLS LATER](https://go.berniesanders.com/call-later-1 "https://go.berniesanders.com/call-later-1")**
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/call-now-1 "https://go.berniesanders.com/call-now-1")
So far Hillary Clinton has won 23 states and our political revolution has notched 19 victories of our own. It's really close! And two wins tomorrow would make it even closer going into the final six states that vote on June 7.
As you watch the returns come in, please know that [**making calls today**](https://go.berniesanders.com/call-now-1 "https://go.berniesanders.com/call-now-1") or [**signing up to make calls and completing them tomorrow**](https://go.berniesanders.com/call-later-1 "https://go.berniesanders.com/call-later-1") could be the difference between victory and defeat. That's how close we expect tomorrow's results could be, and it's why your response to this email is so important.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Official Maggie Hassan Headquarters
subject: Donald Trump, Kelly Ayotte, and Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3ea/2a380d31/12065845/f8adbe/1004349604/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3ea/2a380d31/12065845/f8adbe/1004349604/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Women's health groups are going all in to support Maggie. Her campaign for U.S. Senate has been endorsed by:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3ea/2a380d31/12065845/f8adbf/1004349604/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3dvbWVuX2VuZG9yc2VtZW50IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNjA1MTNfd29tZW5lbmRvcnNlX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_women_endorsement?refcode=e20160513_womenendorse_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
But, right now we're down one or two points in the polls, and if we're going to elect a real champion for women's health care and economic rights, we need you to step up and make your first gift. [**Please, donate $3 or whatever you can afford right now. Anything you can give makes a difference.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3ea/2a380d31/12065845/f8adbf/1004349604/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3dvbWVuX2VuZG9yc2VtZW50IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNjA1MTNfd29tZW5lbmRvcnNlX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_women_endorsement?refcode=e20160513_womenendorse_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_women_endorsement?refcode=e20160513_womenendorse_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_women_endorsement?refcode=e20160513_womenendorse_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_women_endorsement?refcode=e20160513_womenendorse_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3ea/2a380d31/12065845/f8adbf/1004349604/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3dvbWVuX2VuZG9yc2VtZW50IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNjA1MTNfd29tZW5lbmRvcnNlX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_women_endorsement?refcode=e20160513_womenendorse_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
**With Donald Trump -- who Kelly Ayotte officially supports -- threatening to punish women while calling them "fat pigs" and "bimbos," and Ayotte's own votes to defund Planned Parenthood and calls to undermine _Roe v. Wade_ , the stakes in this race are massive.**
If we're going to push back on Washington Republicans' anti-choice agenda and ensure quality, accessible women's health care we HAVE to elect Maggie. As Senator, she will fight to protect a woman's right to make her own health care decisions and to safely and affordably access health care -- not play political games with reproductive rights.
[**Join Planned Parenthood, NARAL and EMILY's List and help elect Maggie. Give what you can now to elect a real champion for women's health care rights, Maggie Hassan.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3ea/2a380d31/12065845/f8adbf/1004349604/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3dvbWVuX2VuZG9yc2VtZW50IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNjA1MTNfd29tZW5lbmRvcnNlX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_women_endorsement?refcode=e20160513_womenendorse_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
-- Team Maggie

name: Mike Mikus
subject: Most competitive, most critical
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/754658726371131392/4081410252048695296?refcode=e20160516&refcode2=e20160516nd&amount=25)
---
Friend -- Katie's Senate race is one of the most competitive, and one of the most critical, in the entire country. Here's why Katie needs us with her right now:

1. Our race is a **dead heat** \-- the latest public polling shows us locked in a statistical tie (Katie McGinty 44 / Pat Toomey 45)

2. _NPR_ and the _Washington Post_ have ranked Toomey's Senate seat **one of the most likely to flip parties**

3. Toomey and his special interest allies like Club for Growth have **already spent nearly $1 MILLION in ads** that attack Katie and lie about Toomey's record

**The path to the Senate majority cuts straight through Pennsylvania -- meaning Katie is our best shot at taking back the Senate for Democrats.**

[**Katie needs you now, will you chip in $5 so we can surge ahead in the polls and flip the Senate back to blue?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/754658726371131392/4081410252048695296?refcode=e20160516&refcode2=e20160516nd&amount=25)

Control of the Senate will come down to Katie's race. None of us can afford to sit this one out.

Mike Mikus
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/754658726371131392/4081410252048695296?refcode=e20160516&refcode2=e20160516nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Mike Weinholtz
subject: SIGN NOW: Utahns deserve full coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
body:
| | Expanding access to affordable healthcare shouldn't be a tough choice.
---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3734679257780259584/-4372767646014043392?recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) Expanding access to affordable healthcare is not a tough choice. It's both morally right and fiscally responsible to give all Utahns access to high-quality, affordable healthcare services. **[Sign my petition: Support Medicaid Expansion in Utah.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3734679257780259584/-4372767646014043392?recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3734679257780259584/-4372767646014043392?recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) I've worked in healthcare for more than 30 years. I understand better than career politicians what works, and what doesn't, when it comes to providing better care at a reasonable cost. The simple fact is, every time a family in our state goes broke because of an unexpected illness or accident, the legislature and the governor have failed a Utah family. As Governor, I'll ensure that women are able to make their own health choices, returning veterans are given access to quality physical and mental care and that those who suffer with addiction are given every opportunity to turn their lives around. **I will never look the other way when a Utah family is forced to choose between taking their sick child to the doctor or putting food on the table.** **[JOIN THIS FIGHT: Sign my Medicaid Expansion Petition today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3734679257780259584/-4372767646014043392?recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)** We can't let Governor Herbert and the legislature continue to turn a blind eye to nearly 100,000 Utahns who cannot afford health coverage. Mike [SIGN MY PETITION](https://act.myngp.com/el/3734679257780259584/-4372767646014043392?recipientId=ENzs9AKZ1wqBssNbEIT6L&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com "Mike Weinholtz Contribute") | Paid for by Mike Weinholtz for Governor
---
Mike for Utah
193 W. 2100 S.
South Salt Lake UT 84115 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3734679257780259584/-4444825240051971328).

I understand better than career politicians what works, and what doesn't, when it comes to providing better care at a reasonable cost. The simple fact is, every time a family in our state goes broke because of an unexpected illness or accident, the legislature and the governor have failed a Utah family. name: Eric Hyers
subject: public numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

Wednesday at midnight is our next big financial deadline. **In days, our fundraising totals go public and the press and pundits will immediately scrutinize them to judge how well our campaign is doing.** We can't fall short.

Steve's opponent is already pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars of his own money into TV ads across the state and we expect him to spend millions more.

Help make sure that when the fundraising numbers are posted next week, it's clear that Montanans are rallying around Steve. **[We're 88 donors short of our goal. We need your help now.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=uKVv6M6CemGUT%2F%2ByX8NqZjYn4iMGXdaE)**

Thanks,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Phil Scott Launches ‘Green Flag’ Campaign Kick-Off Tour
body:
| | | **Phil Scott Launches ‘Green Flag’ Campaign Kick-Off Tour **
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=99c6e7c15e&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| **For Immediate Release**
Contact: Brittney Wilson
802-274-2722
**Phil Scott Launches ‘Green Flag’ Campaign Kick-Off Tour **
_Debuts ‘Blizzard’, A Mobile Campaign Office_
Middlesex, Vt. -- Phil Scott is kicking the campaign season into high gear with a statewide tour.

Dubbed the _Green Flag Tour_ , Scott will campaign in all of Vermont’s 14 counties. “I’m looking forward to discussing my plan to strengthen our economy, make Vermont more affordable and make sure the state budget does not grow faster than Vermont’s economy or Vermonters’ income,” Scott said.

Scott said the tour is also an opportunity to listen to the ideas and perspectives of other Vermonters. “Listening and learning is the key to bringing people together around our goals of a stronger, more affordable Vermont and restoring faith and trust in state government,” he added.

The Scott campaign is also debuting “Blizzard” – a small passenger bus converted to a mobile campaign office. “Like the type of state government we will run, our campaign will be efficient, nimble and responsive,” Scott said. “Our mobile campaign office not only makes transporting staff and volunteers easier, it also gives us the ability to set up a campaign headquarters anywhere in Vermont.”

Scott’s tour begins today (Monday, May 16) with events in Caledonia and Essex counties. The campaign will be visiting Washington, Bennington and Rutland counties later this week.

11:30 a.m. Meet and Greet, St. Jay Subaru & GMC

2:00 p.m. The Caledonian Record

3:00 p.m. Tour Northeastern Vermont Regional Hospital

4:30 p.m. Kingdom Taproom Meeting & Tour

6:00 p.m. Concord General Store

7:00 p.m. Caledonia County Republican Committee
###
---

Dubbed the Green Flag Tour , Scott will campaign in all of Vermont’s 14 counties. “I’m looking forward to discussing my plan to strengthen our economy, make Vermont more affordable and make sure the state budget does not grow faster than Vermont’s economy or Vermonters’ income,” Scott said. Scott said the tour is also an opportunity to listen to the ideas and perspectives of other Vermonters. “Listening and learning is the key to bringing people together around our goals of a stronger, more affordable Vermont and restoring faith and trust in state government,” he added. The Scott campaign is also debuting “Blizzard” – a small passenger bus converted to a mobile campaign office. “Like the type of state government we will run, our campaign will be efficient, nimble and responsive,” Scott said. “Our mobile campaign office not only makes transporting staff and volunteers easier, it also gives us the ability to set up a campaign headquarters anywhere in Vermont.” Scott’s tour begins today (Monday, May 16) with events in Caledonia and Essex counties. The campaign will be visiting Washington, Bennington and Rutland counties later this week. 11:30 a.m. Meet and Greet, St. Jay Subaru & GMC 2:00 p.m. The Caledonian Record 3:00 p.m. Tour Northeastern Vermont Regional Hospital 4:30 p.m. Kingdom Taproom Meeting & Tour 6:00 p.m. Concord General Store 7:00 p.m. Caledonia County Republican Committee | | | | | | | | | | | | "DONATE TODAY!" | "JOIN THE TEAM!" | | Phil Scott for Governor, Glen Wright, Treasurer, 46 Three Mile Bridge Road, Middlesex, VT 05602 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or

name: Corry Bliss
subject: Rob vs. Ted on education
body:
| Peter -- There are many differences between Ted Strickland and Rob Portman, but one of the most striking differences is their records on education.

When Ted was governor, he cut funding for colleges and universities by $170 million, reversed his promise to freeze tuition, and drove up costs for students and parents.

Rob Portman is the only candidate in this race looking out for students across Ohio. Rob has delivered solutions to keep college affordable by increasing access to college credits for high school students, strengthening college savings accounts, lowering student loan rates, and helping low-income students get a college degree. Rob is fighting for the Repay Act, legislation that helps college students with student loan consolidation and practical repayment options.
[](https://www.robportman.com/compare_education_record?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=comp_edu_blast&n=1)
Last year, we launched Students for Portman -- a coalition of hundreds of Ohio students with co-chairs on more than 30 colleges across Ohio.

[Watch our videos to learn more](https://www.robportman.com/compare_education_record?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=comp_edu_blast&n=2)! Sincerely, Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=comp_edu_blast&n=3) [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=comp_edu_blast&n=4)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=comp_edu_blast&n=5)

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=comp_edu_blast&n=6). -=-=-

name: Friends of Cole
subject: Happy Birthday Bill!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Happy Birthday Bill Cole! Bill has dedicated his birthday to working hard under the dome to fight against wasteful spending and bring a balanced approach as a solution to West Virginia’s budget deficits. Join Team Cole in wishing Bill a happy birthday while he is working hard to bring a real solution to the budget crisis! **Send him a message on his birthday by clicking[here.](http://www.billcolewv.com/happy_birthday?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=happybdaybill&n=1)** The budget crisis demands strong leadership and a vision for West Virginia, and as Cole said over the weekend, “I think that’s what the next governor has to do is go in and reform and streamline state government.” This kind of leadership is exactly why we need Bill Cole as the next Governor of West Virginia. **So please join Team Cole in[sending Pres. Cole a Happy Birthday note ](http://www.billcolewv.com/happy_birthday?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=happybdaybill&n=2)**and share your thoughts on his leadership to bring a balanced approach to West Virginia’s budget crisis. Thank you for your support!

Friends of Cole
http://www.billcolewv.com/

Public Employees Please Disregard

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: no sleep ‘til November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
We're all here for the same reason | Friend --

Over the next few months, we’re going to open field offices in every battleground state, fill them to the brim with organizers and volunteers, and get folks on the phone and out in neighborhoods talking to voters about how we have to elect Hillary.

Like anything worth doing, it’s going to be hard! And I want to be real about that. Our organizers will barely sleep, and our volunteers will give up their precious time and energy. But all of us together are part of this campaign for the same reason: Hillary is going to be an incredible president who will wake up every single day ready to fight for our families -- and the idea of a Trump presidency is too atrocious to leave up to chance.

Let those hard-working organizers and volunteers know you’ve got their back. **Donate $1 right now to get your name up on the wall in a battleground state field office (and leave a little note for the team once you do):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Meg

Meg Ansara
Battleground States Director
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU1MDE5NDUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAyNDI2NzQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Jodi Picoult
subject: Not novel-length, I promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello there,
As a Granite State author and mom, I love New Hampshire, and I love the idea of someone representing us in Washington who fights for hard-working families too.
Maggie Hassan has been a fighter for inclusion, innovation and opportunity as a State Senator and Governor, and I know she will continue to be a champion for us in the U.S. Senate.
She's working hard to expand middle class opportunity, protect women's health care rights, and preserve our environment. [**That's what real leadership looks like, and that's why I'm asking you to join me in supporting her -- will you donate $3 to make sure Maggie wins?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3e2/2a380d31/13fb2a33/f8abe3/4079189513/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTE2X3BpY291bHRfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160516_picoult_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Maggie is running against Republican incumbent Kelly Ayotte who has made it clear that she's not putting New Hampshire families first. She's voted six times to defund Planned Parenthood, was the only New England Senator to vote against clean water protections, and is publicly against marriage equality. And, she's still refusing to do her job and stop obstructing the Supreme Court confirmation process.
This election -- and making sure Maggie wins -- is about all of us, not just those at the top.
**It's about people like my son, who should have the right to marry whomever he loves.** Maggie led the charge to pass New Hampshire's historic marriage equality bill, and as Governor she further strengthened protections for married LGBTQ people. That's how I know she'll fight for families like mine.
**It's about ensuring women receive equal pay for equal work and have access to quality, affordable health care.** Organizations like Planned Parenthood and EMILY's List have endorsed Maggie because they know she'll make sure women and their families have the resources they need to thrive.
**It's about our students and making sure they have access to affordable higher education.** Maggie froze in-state college tuition to help make it easier for Granite Staters to get the education they need to succeed, and I know she'll build on this progress in the United States Senate.
[**Please, join me and make your support official -- give what you can to help elect Maggie and get the Senate working for all of our families.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3e2/2a380d31/13fb2a33/f8abe3/4079189513/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTE2X3BpY291bHRfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160516_picoult_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
All the best,
Jodi Picoult

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3e2/2a380d31/13fb2a33/f8abe3/4079189513/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTE2X3BpY291bHRfbmgtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160516_picoult_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd3e2/2a380d31/13fb2a33/f8abec/4079189513/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States
